name: Ports
shortDesc: A platform where users invest in other creators' portfolios in exchange for a share of the profits. I led full-stack development across a PostgreSQL schema, a 20+ endpoint Spring Boot API with Bearer auth and encryption, and a React frontend built from Figma drafts, all live at invest-ports.com.

hero.badge: Ports · Full Stack Developer, Risk Management · May 2024 to May 2025
hero.title: Invest in other people's
paragraphs: Most investing apps are about your portfolio. Ports is about everyone else's. Creators publish their portfolios, and other users can back them with real capital in exchange for a share of the profits, a marketplace of strategies you can actually invest in, not just watch.

I led full-stack development as a Full Stack Developer on the Risk Management side of the platform, remote, from May 2024 to May 2025. Designed and built the PostgreSQL schema with relational tables and dynamic SQL for flexible analytics queries, owned the Spring Boot backend with 20+ REST endpoints behind Bearer-token auth and encryption, and translated Figma drafts into a clean React frontend deployed to invest-ports.com.

points.title: Creator portfolios as the product
points.desc: The core platform lets users invest in other creators' portfolios and share in the returns. Browse, evaluate, allocate, get paid out. The leaderboard isn't a vanity metric, it's a discovery surface for capital.

points.title: PostgreSQL schema + dynamic SQL
points.desc: Designed the relational schema covering users, creators, portfolios, holdings, allocations, and profit-share accounting. Built dynamic SQL on top so analytics queries can stay flexible and targeted without spawning a separate endpoint per cut.

points.title: 20+ endpoint Spring Boot API
points.desc: Led backend development in Spring Boot. 20+ REST endpoints covering portfolio management, allocations, profit-share settlement, and analytics, all sitting behind Bearer-token auth with encryption for sensitive data.

points.title: Figma to live UI
points.desc: Translated Figma drafts into a clean, responsive React frontend. Built the components, wired them to the API, and deployed to invest-ports.com, the production surface real users land on.

demo.label: Walkthrough
demo.title: Ports in motion
demo.subtitle: The same tutorial video new users see embedded in the in-app settings page.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: From signup to profit share
howItWorks.subtitle: The investor's path through the platform.

steps.title: Sign in and onboard
steps.desc: Google OAuth or email/password lands you on the Home dashboard. Choose whether you're publishing a portfolio of your own, investing in someone else's, or both.

steps.title: Browse creator portfolios
steps.desc: The Market view lists creators and their portfolios with live performance, holdings, and historical analytics, all served from the Spring Boot API over the dynamic-SQL analytics layer.

steps.title: Allocate capital
steps.desc: Back a portfolio you believe in. The platform records the allocation, the terms, and the profit-share split, then tracks the position through every price tick.

steps.title: Share in the profits
steps.desc: Returns are computed and split between creator and investors according to the recorded terms. The leaderboard surfaces who's actually working so capital flows toward the strategies that earn it.

tech.label: Under the hood
tech.title: How it's built
tech.subtitle: A React frontend, a Spring Boot API on PostgreSQL, and a Python data pipeline keeping the quotes fresh.

items: React 18 + React Router v6 on Create React App (react-scripts + react-app-rewired with `customize-cra`)
Built from Figma drafts, deployed to invest-ports.com
MUI v6 + MUI X (DataGrid Pro, Charts, DatePickers), Joy UI, Tailwind, shadcn, Radix for the component layer
Chart.js + react-chartjs-2 + Igniteui-react-charts for portfolio and price charts, framer-motion + tsparticles for landing polish
Auth & hardening on the client: `@react-oauth/google`, jsonwebtoken, bcryptjs, crypto-js, react-secure-storage, reCAPTCHA, adblock detection, javascript-obfuscator
20+ REST endpoints covering portfolios, allocations, profit-share settlement, and analytics
Bearer-token auth on the API layer with encryption for sensitive data handling
Spring Data JPA + Spring Security + JJWT for persistence and session security
Apache Commons Math for portfolio analytics calculations
Relational schema spanning users, creators, portfolios, holdings, allocations, and profit-share accounting
Advanced dynamic SQL on top of the schema so analytics queries can stay flexible and targeted
PostgreSQL as the system of record for everything that matters: capital flows, position history, settlement
Python scripts (`python_scripts/`) with `yfinance` pulling S&P 500 quotes on a schedule and writing into Postgres
Rotating broker-access-key updaters (`KeyUpdater.py`, SIM1/SIM2) for live + simulated feeds
`ai_scripts/chat_strat.py` powers an in-app strategy chat surface via OpenAI
MSW (Mock Service Worker) so the frontend can run offline against a mocked API surface
Frontend and backend split into separate repos so the React and Spring sides iterate independently
Tutorial video embedded directly in the settings page so onboarding lives where users land first
